results.question: Benh nhan SYN-001 co di ung gi?
results.answer: Benh nhan SYN-001 co di ung: Penicillin, phan ung noi man do.

results.question: SYN-003 dang dung thuoc nao?
results.answer: Benh nhan SYN-003 dang dung: Insulin 10 UI truoc bua sang.

results.question: Chi so xet nghiem bat thuong cua SYN-002 la gi?
results.answer: Chi so xet nghiem bat thuong cua SYN-002: Creatinine=180 (high); eGFR=42 (low)
